---
title: "RESPIFINDER: new analysis"
output: word_document
date: "2025-09-21"
---




```{r}
# Define a vector with the package names
packages <- c("purrr", "dplyr", "tidyr", "knitr", "magrittr", "reshape2", 
              "tidyverse", "ggplot2", "RColorBrewer", "stringr", 
              "rstatix", "ggpubr", "ggsignif", "FSA", "boot", "coin",
              "readxl", "viridis", "patchwork",  "lme4", 
              "matrixStats", "ggfortify", "factoextra", "pheatmap",
              "cowplot","psych","randomcoloR","ggcorrplot","lmerTest",
              "emmeans")

# Function to load or install packages
load_packages <- function(packages) {
  sapply(packages, function(pkg) {
    if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
      install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
    }
  })
}

# Load the packages
load_packages(packages)
```

# Import data
```{r}

df <- read_excel("05-multiplex_PCR_data.xlsx")

```

# Table of detections per sample type
```{r}
total_samples <- df %>%
  group_by(Sampling_Method) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

positive_summary <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Result)) %>%
  group_by(Sampling_Method, Result) %>%
  summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_summary <- positive_summary %>%
  left_join(total_samples, by = "Sampling_Method") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = (Count / Total) * 100)



print(df_summary)

library(gt)
df_summary %>%
  separate(Sampling_Method, into = c("Method", "Approach"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    Count      = ifelse(is.na(Count), 0, Count),
    Percentage = ifelse(is.na(Percentage), 0, Percentage),
    CountPerc  = paste0(Count, " (", round(Percentage,2), "%)")
  ) %>%
  # Remove the extra columns
  select(-Count, -Total, -Percentage) %>%
  # Pivot so each pathogen is its own column
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Result,
    values_from = CountPerc,
    values_fill = "0 (0%)"
  ) %>%
  gt(
    groupname_col = "Method",  # MLF, MTS, etc. become row groups
    rowname_col   = "Approach" # Professional, Self, etc. become row labels
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Positive Results (Count and Percentage)"
  ) %>%
  # Bold the pathogen column headers
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  # Bold the main sample types (row group labels)
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  )%>%
  # Italicize B. pertussis and C. pneumoniae column headers
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(style = "italic"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("B.Pert", "C.Pneu"))
  )


tbl <- df_summary %>%
  separate(Sampling_Method, into = c("Method", "Approach"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    Count      = ifelse(is.na(Count), 0, Count),
    Total      = ifelse(is.na(Total), 0, Total),
    Percentage = ifelse(is.na(Percentage), 0, Percentage),
    CountPerc  = paste0(Count, "/", Total, " (", round(Percentage, 2), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(-Count, -Percentage) %>%  # keep Total if you want, or drop
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = Result,
    values_from  = CountPerc,
    values_fill  = "0/0 (0%)"
  ) %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "Method", rowname_col = "Approach") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Positive Results (Count/Total and Percentage)") %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(style = "italic"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("B.Pert", "C.Pneu"))
  )

tbl

# save the gt table as an image (PNG)
gtsave(tbl, "respi_tbl.html")

```



# Supplementary figure (concordance of detections)
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

plot_data <- df %>%
  select(ID,SampleID,Nostril, Sample_Type, Sampling_Strategy, Result) %>%
  mutate(
    Result2 = case_when(
      is.na(Result) ~ "Negative",                # keep missing separate
      Result == "Negative" ~ "Negative",
      TRUE ~ "Positive"
    ),Nostril = ifelse(Sampling_Strategy == "Self", NA, Nostril),
    Sample_N = ifelse(is.na(Nostril), Sample_Type, paste0(Sample_Type, "_", Nostril))
  )

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Sample_N, 
                      y = ID, fill = Result2)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~Sampling_Strategy, , scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Positive" = "darkorange3", "Negative" = "lightgray")) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Participant ID", fill = "PCR Result"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
    theme(
  axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 16),   # y-axis title
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 14, angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    strip.text    = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),  # facet labels
    legend.text   = element_text(size = 14),                 # legend entries
    legend.title  = element_text(size = 16)   # legend title
  )


# save figure
ggsave(
  filename = "concordance_plot.tiff",
  plot     = last_plot(),   
  device   = "tiff",
  dpi      = 300,           
  width    = 10,            
  height   = 9              
)



```
